values.name: DISABLE
values.description: Disable

values.name: ENABLE
values.description: Enable

bitfields.name: ISP_PIN_ENTRY
bitfields.description: Disable ISP mode entry through pin assertion

values.name: ISP_ENTRY_ALLOWED_0
values.description: ISP entry allowed

values.name: ISP_ENTRY_DISABLED
values.description: ISP entry disabled

values.name: ISP_ENTRY_ALLOWED_2
values.description: ISP entry allowed

values.name: ISP_ENTRY_ALLOWED_3
values.description: ISP entry allowed

bitfields.name: ISP_API_ENTRY
bitfields.description: Disable ISP mode entry through ROM API call. ISP mode can be entered through ROM API invocation

values.name: ISP_ENTRY_ALLOWED_0
values.description: ISP entry allowed

values.name: ISP_ENTRY_DISABLED
values.description: ISP entry disabled

values.name: ISP_ENTRY_ALLOWED_2
values.description: ISP entry allowed

values.name: ISP_ENTRY_ALLOWED_3
values.description: ISP entry allowed

bitfields.name: ISP_FT_ENTRY
bitfields.description: Disable ISP mode entry on image authentication failure

values.name: ISP_ENTRY_ALLOWED_0
values.description: ISP entry allowed

values.name: ISP_ENTRY_DISABLED

values.name: ISP_ENTRY_ALLOWED_2
values.description: ISP entry allowed

values.name: ISP_ENTRY_ALLOWED_3

registers.name: Reserved 0x00008
registers.description: This field is reserved for internal use

registers.name: BOOT_TIMERS
registers.description: Boot timers

bitfields.name: POWERDOWN_TIMEOUT_SECS
bitfields.description: Powerdown timeout: Timeout value in seconds. When a non-zero value is programmed in this field ROM uses it as idle timeout value to enter power-down state to conserve power

registers.name: ISP_UART_CFG
registers.description: ISP UART configuration

bitfields.name: UART_RX_PIN
bitfields.description: Override default UART RX ISP pin. Identifies the pin to be used as UART_RX pin. [4:0] GPIO Pin number [7:5] GPIO port number

bitfields.name: UART_RX_FUNC_SLOT
bitfields.description: Identifies the pin mux function slot

bitfields.name: UART_ISP_INSTANCE_SEL
bitfields.description: Identifies the UART instance for UART ISP mode

bitfields.name: UART_TX_PIN
bitfields.description: Override default UART TX ISP pin. Identifies the pin to be used as UART_TX pin. [4:0] GPIO Pin number [7:5] GPIO port number

bitfields.name: UART_TX_FUNC_SLOT
bitfields.description: Identifies the pin mux function slot

registers.name: ISP_I2C_CFG
registers.description: ISP I2C configuration

bitfields.name: I2C_SCL_PIN
bitfields.description: Override default UART RX ISP pin. Identifies the pin to be used as UART_RX pin. [4:0] GPIO Pin number [7:5] GPIO port number

bitfields.name: I2C_SCL_FUNC_SLOT
bitfields.description: Identifies the pin mux function slot

bitfields.name: I2C_ISP_INSTANCE_SEL
bitfields.description: Identifies the i2c instance used for UART ISP mode

bitfields.name: I2C_SDA_PIN
bitfields.description: Override default UART TX ISP pin. Identifies the pin to be used as UART_TX pin. [4:0] GPIO Pin number [7:5] GPIO port number

bitfields.name: I2C_SDA_FUNC_SLOT
bitfields.description: Identifies the pin mux function slot

registers.name: ISP_SPI_CFG0
registers.description: ISP SPI configuration0

bitfields.name: SPI_SCK_PIN
bitfields.description: Override default SPI_SCK ISP pin. Identifies the pin to be used as SPI_SCK pin. [4:0] GPIO Pin number [7:5] GPIO port number

bitfields.name: SPI_SCK_FUNC_SLOT
bitfields.description: Identifies the pin mux function slot

bitfields.name: SPI_ISP_INSTANCE_SEL
bitfields.description: Identifies the SPI instance used for SPI ISP mode

bitfields.name: SPI_MOSI_PIN
bitfields.description: Override default SPI_MOSI ISP pin. Identifies the pin to be used as SPI_MOSI pin. [4:0] GPIO Pin number [7:5] GPIO port number

bitfields.name: SPI_MOSI_FUNC_SLOT
bitfields.description: Identifies the pin mux function slot

registers.name: ISP_SPI_CFG1
registers.description: ISP SPI configuration1

bitfields.name: SPI_MISO_PIN
bitfields.description: Override default SPI_MISO ISP pin. Identifies the pin to be used as SPI_MISO pin. [4:0] GPIO Pin number [7:5] GPIO port number

bitfields.name: SPI_MISO_FUNC_SLOT
bitfields.description: Identifies the pin mux function slot

bitfields.name: SPI_SSEL_PIN
bitfields.description: Override default SPI_SSEL ISP pin. Identifies the pin to be used as SPI_SSEL pin. [4:0] GPIO Pin number [7:5] GPIO port number

bitfields.name: SPI_SSEL_FUNC_SLOT
bitfields.description: Identifies the pin mux function slot

bitfields.name: ISP_SPI_SSEL_X
bitfields.description: SPI chip select number. FlexComm SPI interfaces supports up to four chip selects

registers.name: ISP_MISC_CFG
registers.description: ISP misc configuration

bitfields.name: I2C_SLAVE_ADDR
bitfields.description: I2C slave address A 7-bit Address used for selecting our device on shared I2C bus system. By default ROM uses 0x10 as slave address. If this address conflicts with another slave on board customer could use this field to override the address

bitfields.name: ISP_SPI_CUST
bitfields.description: Use customer defined SPI ISP pins

values.name: DEFAULT_ROM_DEFINED_PIN_0
values.description: Default ROM defined pins

values.name: CUSTOMER_DEFINED
values.description: Customer defined

values.name: DEFAULT_ROM_DEFINED_PIN_2
values.description: Default ROM defined pins

values.name: DEFAULT_ROM_DEFINED_PIN_3
values.description: Default ROM defined pins

bitfields.name: ISP_I2C_CUST
bitfields.description: Use customer defined I2C ISP pins

values.name: DEFAULT_ROM_DEFINED_PIN_0
values.description: Default ROM defined pins

values.name: CUSTOMER_DEFINED
values.description: Customer defined

values.name: DEFAULT_ROM_DEFINED_PIN_2
values.description: Default ROM defined pins

values.name: DEFAULT_ROM_DEFINED_PIN_3
values.description: Default ROM defined pins

bitfields.name: ISP_UART_CUST
bitfields.description: Use customer defined UART ISP pins

values.description: Default ROM defined pins

values.name: CUSTOMER_DEFINED
values.description: Customer defined

values.name: DEFAULT_ROM_DEFINED_PIN_3
values.description: Default ROM defined pins

registers.name: BOOT_IMG_CFG
registers.description: Boot IMG configuration

bitfields.name: IMG_CHECK_ENF
bitfields.description: Image check enforcement. This field defines the minimum image verification procedure (CRC32, MISR)

values.name: ALL_ALLOWED
values.description: All Image types are allowed

values.name: CRC_IMAGE
values.description: CRC image is allowed. CRC32 is used to do the check

values.name: MISR_IMAGE
values.description: MISR image is allowed. MISR is used to do the check

values.name: ALL_ALLOWED_OVERRIDE
values.description: All Image types are allowed

bitfields.name: LP_CRC_EN
bitfields.description: Image check enforcement for low power wakeup flow. This field defines the whether do CRC32 check for image

values.name: IMAGE_CHECK_DISABLED_0
values.description: Image check is disabled

values.name: CRC32_CHECK
values.description: CRC32 is used to do the check

values.name: IMAGE_CHECK_DISABLED_2
values.description: Image check is disabled

values.name: IMAGE_CHECK_DISABLED_3
values.description: Image check is disabled

bitfields.name: ACTIVE_IMG_PROT
bitfields.description: Protection of active image. This field defines protection of flash area occupied by the active image. Only applicable to internal flash

values.name: GLBAC4_USED_0
values.description: GLBAC4 is used. FLASH_ACL settings are ignored

values.name: GLBAC4_USED_1
values.description: GLBAC4 is used. FLASH_ACL settings are ignored

values.name: FLASH_ACL_PROT
values.description: Protection is defined using the CMPA FLASH_ACL settings

values.name: GLBAC4_USED_3
values.description: GLBAC4 is used. FLASH_ACL settings are ignored

bitfields.name: RAM_ECC_CLEAR
bitfields.description: Clear ECC for the whole RAM at boot stage

values.name: NOT_CLEAR_0
values.description: Not clear

values.name: CLEAR
values.description: clear

values.name: NOT_CLEAR_2
values.description: Not clear

values.name: NOT_CLEAR_3
values.description: Not clear

registers.name: Reserved 0x00028
registers.description: This field is reserved for internal use

registers.name: Reserved 0x0002C
registers.description: This field is reserved for internal use

registers.name: QUICK_SET_GPIO_0
registers.description: Drive GPIO 0 port pins high after reset. Each bit corresponds to the pin in GPIO port 0. When set ROM drives the corresponding pin high as soon as possible. By default most pins come-up as tri-stated inputs. This feature allows customer to specify active drive pins soon after reset instead of waiting till complete boot

registers.name: QUICK_CLR_GPIO_0
registers.description: Drive GPIO 0 port pins low. See description of QUICK_SET_GPIO_0 field

registers.name: QUICK_SET_GPIO_1
registers.description: Drive GPIO 1 port pins high. See description of QUICK_SET_GPIO_0 field

registers.name: QUICK_CLR_GPIO_1
registers.description: Drive GPIO 1 port pins low. See description of QUICK_SET_GPIO_0 field

registers.name: QUICK_SET_GPIO_2
registers.description: Drive GPIO 0 port pins high after reset. Each bit corresponds to the pin in GPIO port 0. When set ROM drives the corresponding pin high as soon as possible. By default most pins come-up as tri-stated inputs. This feature allows customer to specify active drive pins soon after reset instead of waiting till complete boot

registers.name: QUICK_CLR_GPIO_2
registers.description: Drive GPIO 0 port pins low. See description of QUICK_SET_GPIO_0 field

registers.name: QUICK_SET_GPIO_3
registers.description: Drive GPIO 1 port pins high. See description of QUICK_SET_GPIO_0 field

registers.name: QUICK_CLR_GPIO_3
registers.description: Drive GPIO 1 port pins low. See description of QUICK_SET_GPIO_0 field

registers.name: QUICK_SET_GPIO_4
registers.description: Drive GPIO 0 port pins high after reset. Each bit corresponds to the pin in GPIO port 0. When set ROM drives the corresponding pin high as soon as possible. By default most pins come-up as tri-stated inputs. This feature allows customer to specify active drive pins soon after reset instead of waiting till complete boot

registers.name: QUICK_CLR_GPIO_4
registers.description: Drive GPIO 0 port pins low. See description of QUICK_SET_GPIO_0 field

registers.name: Reserved 0x00058
registers.description: This field is reserved for internal use

registers.name: Reserved 0x0005C
registers.description: This field is reserved for internal use

registers.name: FLASH_ACL_0_7
registers.description: Flash ACL 0 7

bitfields.name: ACL_SEC_0
bitfields.description: ACL sec 0

values.name: DEFAULT_RW_UNLOCKED
values.description: Data flash and unlocked (RW__). Default flash behavior with read and write access only. Instruction fetches (execute access) are blocked and generates security violation. Blocks assigned with this access control index can be changed to another index by software

values.name: DATA_RW_LOCKED
values.description: Data flash and locked (RW_L). Read and write operations are allowed but execution is blocked. Blocks assigned with this access control index cannot be changed to another index until next reset

values.name: ROM_RX_LOCKED
values.description: Read only Memory (ROM) and locked (R_XL). Read & execute operations are allowed but write is blocked. Blocks assigned with this access control index cannot be changed to another index until next reset

values.name: DATA_ROM_LOCKED
values.description: Data Read only memory (DROM) and locked (R__L). Read operations is allowed but write & execute are blocked. Blocks assigned with this access control index cannot be changed to another index until next reset

values.name: ROM_RX_UNLOCKED
values.description: Read-Only-Memory (ROM) and un-locked (R_X_). Read & execute operations are allowed but write is blocked. Blocks assigned with this access control index can be changed to another index by software

values.name: XOM_UNLOCKED
values.description: eXecute-only Memory (XOM) and un-locked (__X_). Execute operations are allowed but read & write are blocked. Blocks assigned with this access control index can be changed to another index by software

values.name: XOM_LOCKED
values.description: eXecute-Only-Memory (XOM) and locked (__XL). Execute operations are allowed but read & write are blocked. Blocks assigned with this access control index cannot be changed to another index until next reset

values.name: NO_ACCESS_LOCKED
values.description: Hidden (___L). Read, Write & execute operations are blocked. Once this access control index is assigned to a block, the memory range associated with block is hidden until next reset

values.description: eXecute-Only-Memory (XOM) and locked (__XL). Execute operations are allowed but read & write are blocked. Blocks assigned with this access control index cannot be changed to another index until next reset

values.name: NO_ACCESS_LOCKED
values.description: Hidden (___L). Read, Write & execute operations are blocked. Once this access control index is assigned to a block, the memory range associated with block is hidden until next reset
